metadata.title: Services · Web Design, E-Commerce, Development, SEO, WordPress, Performance, Accessibility | Federico Calicchia
metadata.description: Eleven services, one standard. Web design, e-commerce, custom development, SEO, WordPress, branding, maintenance, Core Web Vitals performance, WCAG accessibility, analytics. No pre-packaged bundles.
metadata.ogTitle: Freelance web & WordPress services — No blame shifting, measured results
metadata.ogDescription: Web design, e-commerce, development, SEO, branding, maintenance, WordPress. One contact, measured results.

list.title: Eleven services, one standard.
list.lead:
No pre-packaged bundles, no fixed price lists.
Every service is built around the real project after a discovery call.
list.pageTitle: Web & WordPress services. No blame shifting, measured results.
list.pageLead:
Four core verticals in the matrix (web design, e-commerce, web development, SEO), plus branding and three specific WordPress jobs (maintenance, support, migration).
One contact, no supplier chain, no project manager who cannot write code.

detail.ctaSubtitle:
A 30-minute call to figure out what's actually needed.
No PowerPoint.
detail.faqHeading: The questions I hear all the time.

metadata.title: Services by profession · Website for every trade | Federico Calicchia
metadata.description: Freelance web design for professions and categories: dentists, lawyers, restaurateurs, craftsmen, hotels, e-commerce. Tailored services for your industry — clients don't search "web designer", they search "website for [profession]".
metadata.ogTitle: Services by profession · Website for every trade
metadata.ogDescription: Web design for professions and categories. A landing page for every service × trade combination.

perProfessione.collectionDescription: Service × profession combinations with a dedicated landing: SEO copy, common industry problems, FAQs, pricing.
perProfessione.intro: Your client isn't searching for "web designer". They search for "dentist website", "lawyer website quote", "craftsman e-commerce". For each trade the website has different priorities: online bookings, portfolio gallery, client area, price list. Below, the matrix of categories and professions with dedicated landings.
perProfessione.categoriesLead: Each category has different problems and priorities — from a showcase site with a gallery to a booking portal with backend.
perProfessione.servicesLead: Web design, development, branding, e-commerce, SEO. Every service pairs with every profession, every combination has its own landing.
perProfessione.ctaHeading: The matrix covers the most in-demand trades. For the rest, write to me.
perProfessione.ctaLead: The matrix covers {count} professions with indexed landings. If your trade is long-tail, we work directly on a quote. A 30-minute call clears up whether it makes sense.
